page.title: Marbella Yacht Charter Starlite 2026: Concert Nights & VIP Sea Transfers

data.meta_description: Plan your Marbella yacht charter Starlite 2026 experience with VIP sea transfers from Puerto Banús. Book now for concert nights & luxury cruising from €749/2h.
data.summary: Discover how a Marbella yacht charter Starlite 2026 can elevate your concert nights with VIP sea transfers from Puerto Banús. Our fleet of 27 boats offers flexible packages from €749/2h, including skipper, drinks, and snacks.
key_facts: Starlite Festival 2026 runs July–August in Marbella's Auditorio.
VIP sea transfers from Puerto Banús to the festival dock available.
Charter prices from €749/2h (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) up to €4,719/4h (Mangusta 80).
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% VAT.
Fleet ranges from 6.4m speedboats (5 pax) to 29m Ferretti 94 (12 pax).
Departs exclusively from Puerto Banús, 5 min from Starlite venue.
Book via WhatsApp for custom itineraries and last-minute availability.

faq.q: What is the Starlite Festival 2026 in Marbella?
faq.a: Starlite is a major international music festival held annually in Marbella, typically from July to August. The 2026 edition features top artists performing at the Auditorio Starlite, a natural amphitheatre in the hills above the Golden Mile. Many attendees combine concert nights with a yacht charter for a complete luxury experience.

faq.q: Can I use a yacht charter to get to the Starlite Festival?
faq.a: Yes, we offer VIP sea transfers from Puerto Banús to a designated dock near the festival venue. After the concert, your skipper will return you to the port. This avoids traffic and adds a glamorous touch to your evening. All our boats include a licensed skipper, so you can relax and enjoy the ride.

faq.q: How much does a Marbella yacht charter for Starlite 2026 cost?
faq.a: Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours, including drinks and snacks. For larger groups, the Mangusta 80 (Tier B) costs €4,719 for a minimum 4-hour charter and includes a free jet ski. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp. All prices include 21% VAT.

faq.q: What boats are available for Starlite 2026 charters?
faq.a: We operate 27 boats from Puerto Banús, including speedboats (6 pax), luxury yachts like the Ferretti 94 (12 pax), and flybridge models like the Azimut 58. For a full list, see our fleet page. Each boat includes a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, and insurance.

faq.q: How many people can I bring on a Starlite yacht charter?
faq.a: Capacity ranges from 5 pax (Dubhe, Mariah SX21) up to 12 pax on most large yachts (Mangusta 80, Ferretti 94, Canados 86). The Azimut 39 holds 11 pax. Check the specific boat page for exact numbers. We recommend booking early for large groups during festival season.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price for Starlite 2026?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden fees. You can also request a custom catering menu via WhatsApp for an additional cost.

faq.q: How do I book a yacht for Starlite 2026?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing. Provide your preferred date, number of guests, and boat type. We recommend booking at least 2–3 weeks in advance for Starlite nights, as demand is high. A deposit may be required to secure the booking.

faq.q: What time should I depart for a Starlite concert?
faq.a: Most Starlite concerts start around 21:00–22:00. We suggest departing Puerto Banús by 19:00–20:00 for a sunset cruise before the show. Your skipper will coordinate the sea transfer timing. After the concert, you'll be returned to the port, typically by 01:00–02:00.

data.body_html:
Plan your Marbella yacht charter Starlite 2026 experience and combine world-class concerts with VIP sea transfers from Puerto Banús. The Starlite Festival, held annually in Marbella's Auditorio, draws international headliners and a glamorous crowd. With our fleet of 27 boats, you can arrive in style, avoid traffic, and enjoy a sunset cruise before the show. Prices start at €749 for 2 hours on a Tier A yacht, including skipper, drinks, and snacks. Whether you're celebrating a special occasion or simply want the best seats in the house—on the water—this guide covers everything you need to know.

Why Choose a Yacht Charter for Starlite 2026?

Starlite is more than a concert series: it's a luxury lifestyle event. A Marbella yacht charter Starlite 2026 elevates your evening with a private transfer that bypasses the Golden Mile traffic. You'll cruise along the coast, sip cava as the sun sets behind La Concha, and dock within walking distance of the venue. After the final encore, your skipper returns you to Puerto Banús—no queues, no taxis. It's the ultimate VIP experience for music lovers.

Our Fleet for Starlite Sea Transfers

We operate 27 boats from Puerto Banús, all available for Starlite charters. For couples or small groups, the Azimut 39 (11 pax, €749/2h) offers a sleek sport cruiser. For larger parties, the Mangusta 80 (12 pax, €4,719/4h) includes a free jet ski. Other options include the Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) and the Canados 86 (26m, 12 pax)—priced on request. View the full Marbella yacht charter fleet for specs and photos.

Pricing & Packages for Starlite 2026

Our pricing is transparent. Tier A (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39): €749 for 2 hours, €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B (Mangusta 80, including white and grey variants): €4,719 minimum 4 hours, with a free jet ski. All other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp. Every charter includes licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% VAT. No hidden extras.

How to Book Your Starlite Yacht Charter

Booking is simple. Contact us on WhatsApp with your preferred date, number of guests, and boat choice. We recommend booking at least 2–3 weeks ahead for Starlite nights, as demand spikes during July and August. A deposit may be required to secure your slot. For last-minute requests, we'll do our best to accommodate. Check our Starlite 2026 guide for updates on artist lineups and transfer timings.

What to Expect on the Night

Depart Puerto Banús around 19:00–20:00 for a sunset cruise. Your skipper will navigate to a designated dock near the Auditorio Starlite, a 10-minute ride. Enjoy drinks and snacks on board before the concert. After the show, your skipper will be waiting to return you to the port. The total sea transfer time is about 20–30 minutes each way, leaving plenty of time for the main event.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the Starlite Festival 2026 in Marbella?

Starlite is a major international music festival held annually in Marbella, typically from July to August. The 2026 edition features top artists performing at the Auditorio Starlite, a natural amphitheatre in the hills above the Golden Mile. Many attendees combine concert nights with a yacht charter for a complete luxury experience.

Can I use a yacht charter to get to the Starlite Festival?

Yes, we offer VIP sea transfers from Puerto Banús to a designated dock near the festival venue. After the concert, your skipper will return you to the port. This avoids traffic and adds a glamorous touch to your evening. All our boats include a licensed skipper, so you can relax and enjoy the ride.

How much does a Marbella yacht charter for Starlite 2026 cost?

Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours, including drinks and snacks. For larger groups, the Mangusta 80 (Tier B) costs €4,719 for a minimum 4-hour charter and includes a free jet ski. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp. All prices include 21% VAT.

What boats are available for Starlite 2026 charters?

We operate 27 boats from Puerto Banús, including speedboats (6 pax), luxury yachts like the Ferretti 94 (12 pax), and flybridge models like the Azimut 58. For a full list, see our fleet page. Each boat includes a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, and insurance.

How many people can I bring on a Starlite yacht charter?

Capacity ranges from 5 pax (Dubhe, Mariah SX21) up to 12 pax on most large yachts (Mangusta 80, Ferretti 94, Canados 86). The Azimut 39 holds 11 pax. Check the specific boat page for exact numbers. We recommend booking early for large groups during festival season.

What is included in the charter price for Starlite 2026?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden fees. You can also request a custom catering menu via WhatsApp for an additional cost.

How do I book a yacht for Starlite 2026?

Contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing. Provide your preferred date, number of guests, and boat type. We recommend booking at least 2–3 weeks in advance for Starlite nights, as demand is high. A deposit may be required to secure the booking.

What time should I depart for a Starlite concert?

Most Starlite concerts start around 21:00–22:00. We suggest departing Puerto Banús by 19:00–20:00 for a sunset cruise before the show. Your skipper will coordinate the sea transfer timing. After the concert, you'll be returned to the port, typically by 01:00–02:00.

Ready to book your Marbella yacht charter Starlite 2026 experience? Browse our fleet or message us on WhatsApp for personalised advice. We look forward to welcoming you on board this summer.
